action.reasoning: Observation: Even importing torch_geometric segfaults. python+torch ok but importing torch_geometric likely causes the bad_alloc. Let me verify by testing torch_geometric import isolation. Analysis: torch is 2.11.0+cu128 which is very new—possibly incompatible with installed torch-geometric/scatter binaries. Decision: Test imports separately to identify root cause.
